result.answer:
This does not meet the contract.

`fetchRecommendation()` converts failures into `{ kind: "unavailable" }`, and the client has no implicit retries, so the no-retry part is satisfied. The missing requirement is the 150 ms deadline: `recommendationClient.get()` has no default deadline, and this call does not set one, so checkout could block longer than allowed.

Smallest correction before merge: add a per-call 150 ms timeout/deadline around `recommendationClient.get(`/carts/${cartId}`)` and keep the existing catch-to-unavailable behavior. No broader change is needed.
